name: Stretch Wrap Film / Cling Film
description: High-clarity LLDPE/LDPE films used for pallet wrapping, food preservation and industrial packaging. Available in machine-grade and hand-grade rolls.
specs:
Thickness: 8–35 micron
Width: 250–2000mm (customizable)
Elongation at Break: >300%
Colors: Clear, black, blue
MOQ: 1,000kg
applications: Logistics pallet wrapping, fresh food packaging, industrial dust cover
imageKeywords: stretch wrap film roll, clear LLDPE packaging film, pallet wrap plastic

name: PET Preforms & Bottles
description: Crystal-clear, food-grade PET preforms and bottles for beverages, cosmetics and condiments. Compatible with standard 28mm PCO1810 caps.
specs:
Neck Finish: 28mm PCO 1810 / 38mm
Weight: 10g–80g (customizable)
Volume: 250ml–5L
Transparency: >90%
MOQ: 100,000 pcs
applications: Water, soda, juice, edible oil, shampoo, cleaning agents
imageKeywords: PET preform 28mm, clear plastic bottle, beverage bottle packaging

name: Plastic Pallets
description: Heavy-duty recyclable HDPE/PP pallets for warehousing, logistics and export shipping. Resistant to moisture, chemicals and insects.
specs:
Size: 1200x1000x150mm (standard)
Static Load: 1,500–6,000kg
Dynamic Load: 500–2,000kg
Colors: Blue, black, grey
MOQ: 100 pcs
applications: Warehousing, racking, export shipping, pharmaceutical storage
imageKeywords: blue plastic pallet, HDPE shipping pallet, stackable warehouse pallet

name: PVC Pipes & Fittings
description: Durable, corrosion-resistant PVC pipes for drainage, water supply and electrical conduits. Joined by solvent cement or rubber-ring joints.
specs:

Pressure Rating: PN6 / PN10 / PN16
Length: 4m or 6m standard
Colors: White, grey, orange
MOQ: 1,000m
applications: Drainage, irrigation, water supply, cable protection, construction
imageKeywords: white PVC pipe, plastic drainage pipe, UPVC plumbing fittings

name: HDPE Jerry Cans & Containers
description: Chemical-resistant HDPE containers for liquids, lubricants and hazardous goods. UN-certified options available for dangerous cargo.

Wall Thickness: 1.2–3mm

Colors: Natural, blue, black

applications: Lubricants, agrochemicals, food oils, cleaning chemicals, solvents

name: Agricultural Mulch / Greenhouse Films

Widths: 1m–14m

MOQ: 2,000kg

name: EPS Foam Packaging / Insulation Boards

Thermal Conductivity: 0.030–0.040 W/(m·K)
